task: move the pot to the towel
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A stainless steel pot sits on a stovetop. A green apple is on a blue towel to the right. The pot is metallic and has a handle; the towel is flat. STRATEGY - First, grasp the pot's handle to lift it. Then, transport it over the towel. Finally, place the pot on the towel. Failure modes include dropping the pot or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the pot's handle. Step 2: Grasp the handle to lift the pot. Step 3: Transport the pot over the towel. Step 4: Place the pot on the towel.**
Goal: on(pot, towel); stable(pot)
Scene: pot, towel, stovetop
Step 1: reach(pot)
  affordance_region: the handle of the pot
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pot, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pot) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pot)
  affordance_region: the handle of the pot
  contact: holding(pot) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pot)
Step 3: transport(pot -> towel)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the towel
  spatial: above(pot, towel, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pot)
  done_when: above(pot, towel, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pot -> towel)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the towel
  contact: surface_contact(pot, towel) [completion]; released(pot) [completion]
  pose: stable(pot) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pot, towel) AND released(pot)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area on the towel
an empty area on the towel
